description: Independent blind-v2 evaluation set (P1-11). Questions are based on the same corpus as the regression/development splits but were NOT used during model tuning. Answer keys are stored in data/evaluation-private/ (gitignored) so quantitative evaluation can be performed without exposing labels in the public repository.
protocol: Evaluate against the blind-v2 answer key using the same evaluation pipeline as the regression split (see scripts/evaluate_rag_answers.py). The answer key must NOT be committed to the public repository. Results should be reported as a relative change vs. the public development/regression baseline, never as a standalone percentage.
